subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, verdant and fresh with the water of God's love, lady of the mountains, plains, and deserts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله و الورقه المخضره الریانه بماء محبت الله جناب خان کوه و دشت و صحرا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action
